content:
# elizaos-plugins/registry Daily Update (Apr 1, 2026)
## OVERVIEW 
The day saw significant activity in plugin proposals, with new pull requests for `plugin-roles`, `plugin-wechat`, and `plugin-vybes`. Discussions continued on existing proposals for agent identity, trust layers, and AI marketplaces, highlighting ongoing efforts to expand ElizaOS capabilities.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

No completed work to report for this period.

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
- A new pull request, [#328](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/328), was opened to add `plugin-roles` and `plugin-wechat` from milady-ai.
- Another pull request, [#327](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/327), was opened to integrate `plugin-vybes` for vybes.fun.

## CLOSED ISSUES

No closed issues to report for this period.

## NEW ISSUES

No new issues to report for this period.

## ACTIVE ISSUES

- **Agent Identity and Trust Layer Discussions:** On [#6688](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6688), the discussion around the "AgentID" plugin proposal continued. The latest comment from majorelalexis-stack at 2026-04-01T18:12:54Z highlighted that MAXIA implements W3C DIDs with AIP v0.3.0 (ed25519) and enforces trust levels L0-L4 with spend caps on-chain, suggesting it could natively solve the ElizaOS trust gap. This builds on earlier discussions about cryptographic identity and trust levels for agent marketplaces.

- **MAXIA AI Marketplace Plugin Proposal:** Issue [#6700](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6700) details a proposal for a `plugin-maxia` to integrate the MAXIA AI-to-AI marketplace. The latest comment from majorelalexis-stack at 2026-04-01T10:33:52Z indicates that the plugin implementation is ready, including 5 actions (MAXIA_DISCOVER, MAXIA_GET_PRICE, MAXIA_SWAP, MAXIA_RENT_GPU, MAXIA_BUY_SERVICE) and a provider (MAXIA_MARKET_CONTEXT), with a sandbox mode for testing. The implementer is ready to submit a PR.

- **MoltBridge Trust & Discovery Layer Integration:** On [#6501](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6501), JKHeadley provided an update at 2026-04-01T08:09:14Z, stating that MoltBridge is still active and has been added to the official A2A registry. The comment also noted that CrewAI has adopted similar trust framing, validating the need for such a layer. The MoltBridge API is stable, and an ElizaOS plugin could expose trust-verified agent discovery.
